stemHtml: During a routine flight, one of your passengers falls ill and you consider a diversion is required. How should you inform ATC of your decision and request priority handling?

options.a: Request an amended clearance without including any prefix.
options.b: Set the transponder to 7700 and send a distress message.
options.c: Transmit a PAN MEDICAL message (call “PAN PAN MAY-DE-CALL”).
options.d: Declare a state of urgency and inform ATC of the reason.
